DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DOLCE & GABBANA USA INC.'S MOTION TO DEEM TRUTH OF FACTS ADMITTED AND GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF DANIEL YOHANNES. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DEEM TRUTH OF FACTS ADMITTED AND GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS IS UNOPPOSED. HOWEVER PLAINTIFF SERVED UNVERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE REQUEST TO ADMIT IN AUGUST 2018 AND HE PARTICIPATED IN A MEET AND CONFER PROCESS. HE IS GIVEN A FURTHER AND FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO RE-SERVE VERIFIED AND COMPLETE RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN TWENTY-FIVE DAYS OF SERVICE A COPY OF THE WITHIN ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO THE MOVING PARTY IN THE SUM OF $500.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN THE AFORESAID TWENTY-FIVE DAYS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DOLCE & GABBANA USA INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF, DANIEL YOHANNESS RESPONSES TO DOLCE GABBANA USA INC.S FORM INTERROGATORIES. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 17.1 AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET TWO IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. THE COURT NOTES PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY SERVED AN UNVERIFIED RESPONSES TO SAID PLEADINGS AND HE PARTICIPATED IN A MEET AND CONFER PROCESS. THE PLAINTIFF SHALL RE-SERVE VERIFIED AND COMPLETE RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, WITHIN TWENTY-FIVE DAYS OF SERVICE OF A COPY OF THIS ORDER WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO THE MOVING PARTY IN THE SUM OF $750.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN THE AFORESAID TWENTY-FIVE DAYS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Truth Of Facts Admitted And Genuineness Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Daniel Yohannes
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Yohannes (510-860-0201) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Jordan T. Nager, esq. (619-233-1150) of Lincoln Gustafson & Cercos, LLP for Defendant DOLCE & GABBANA USA INC.
Courtney H. O'Brien, esq. (510-596-0888) for Defendant ESA USA Corp. via Court Call
Jenna Fischer-Reyes, esq. (714-371-2739) of Law Offices of John A. Hauser via Court Call

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DOLCE & GABBANA USA INC.'s Motion To Deem Truth Of Facts Admitted And Genuineness Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Daniel Yohannes

Defendant's Motion to Deem Truth of Facts Admitted and Genuineness of Documents is unopposed. However plaintiff served unverified responses to the Request to Admit in August 2018 and he participated in a meet and confer process. He is given a further and final opportunity to re-serve verified and complete responses, without objection, within twenty-five days of service a copy of the within Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions are awarded to the moving party in the sum of $500.00 to be paid within the aforesaid twenty-five days.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff, Daniel Yohanness Responses To Dolce Gabbana Usa Inc.S Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Yohannes (510-860-0201) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Jordan T. Nager, esq. (619-233-1150) of Lincoln Gustafson & Cercos, LLP for Defendant DOLCE & GABBANA USA INC.
Courtney H. O'Brien, esq. (510-596-0888) for Defendant ESA USA Corp. via Court Call
Jenna Fischer-Reyes, esq. (714-371-2739) of Law Offices of John A. Hauser via Court Call

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DOLCE & GABBANA USA INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff, Daniel Yohanness Responses To Dolce Gabbana Usa Inc.S Form Interrogatories

Defendant's Motion to Compel Plaintiff to Respond to Form Interrogatories 17.1 and Special Interrogatories Set Two is unopposed and granted. The Court notes plaintiff previously served an unverified responses to said pleadings and he participated in a meet and confer process. The plaintiff shall re-serve verified and complete responses, without objection, within twenty-five days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Sanctions are awarded to the moving party in the sum of $750.00 to be paid within the aforesaid twenty-five days.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
